zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor la Zouche於大約1361年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，她的父親William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche21歲，母親Lady Agnes de Grene21歲。她與Sir John Lovell在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1434年3月15日在英國諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor la Zouche于大约1361年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，她的父亲William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche21岁，母亲Lady Agnes de Grene21岁。她与Sir John Lovell在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1434年3月15日在英国諾薩普頓史爾鐵其馬緒享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor la Zouche was born about 1361, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, her father, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, was 21 and her mother, Lady Agnes de Grene, was 21. She married Sir John Lovell in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 March 1434, in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor la Zouche est née environ 1361, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes de Grene, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Lovell à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 mars 1434, à Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor la Zouche um 1361 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche 21 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes de Grene 21. Sie hat in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Lovell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. März 1434 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor la Zouche è nata il circa 1361 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes de Grene, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Lovell nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 marzo 1434, nel Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor la Zoucheが約1361年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zoucheは21歳，母Lady Agnes de Greneは21歳であった。イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュでSir John Lovellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1434年3月15日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアティトチマーッシュで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor la Zouche(이)가 대략 1361년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes de Grene(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 Sir John Lovell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 3월 15일 영국 노르섬프토실르 티트ch마시에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor la Zouche nasceu aproximadamente 1361, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes de Grene, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Lovell em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de março de 1434, em Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor la Zouche родилась около 1361 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes de Grene, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Lovell в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 марта 1434 г. в местности тичмарш, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor la Zouche nació aproximadamente 1361, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes de Grene, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir John Lovell en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1434, en Titchmarsh, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años.
